creator: leif@neland.dk
text:
As written in private emails, pam.conf is configured correctly.
cclient is the newest in ports
imap-uw is the newest in ports.
world is at most a week old
It still complains in the logs.
imap still works, though.

Leif
PS: I'm writing this as plain-text. Dunno why it got uucoded.
